nasb.text: For these things came to pass to fulfill the Scripture, “Not a bone of Him shall be broken.”

esv.text: For these things took place that the Scripture might be fulfilled: “Not one of his bones will be broken.”

cnv.text: 這些事的發生，是要應驗經上所說的：“他的骨頭，一根也不可折斷。”

ccb.text: 这些事的发生是为了应验圣经上的话：“祂的骨头一根也不会折断”；

csbs.text: 事实上，这些事发生，是为要应验经上的话：“他的骨头，一根也不被折断。”
